allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" https://api.github.com/repos/$GITHUB_REPO/pulls -d '{""title"":""add diff logs and harden tool error handling"",""head"":""patch-chunk-support"",""base"":""main"",""body"":""test""}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in [''number'',''html_url'',''message'',''errors''] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X PUT -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" "https://api.github.com/repos/$GITHUB_REPO/pulls/7/merge" -d '{""merge_method"":""merge"",""commit_title"":""add diff logs and harden tool error handling""}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\(''message'',''''\), d.get\(''sha'',''''\)[:10] if d.get\(''sha''\) else ''''\)")
